name: @0xkobold/pi-mcp
description_en: Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration for pi-coding-agent. Connect to any MCP server (stdio, SSE, StreamableHTTP, WebSocket) and use its tools, resources, and prompts natively.
description_zh: pi-coding-agent 的模型上下文协议 (MCP) 集成。连接到任何 MCP 服务器（stdio、SSE、StreamableHTTP、WebSocket）并原生使用其工具、资源和提示。
